investor_snippet: 48963 people have invested ₹ 33.2Cr in SBI Contra Fund in the last three months
about_text: that invests in out-of-favour or undervalued stocks (a contrarian strategy) to achieve long-term capital appreciation. It employs a combination of top-down and bottom-up analysis to pick stocks across large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap segments. The strategy focuses on assets that are currently unpopular, aiming to profit when market sentiment changes. The primary benchmark for the fund is the BSE 500 Total Return Index (TRI), and its secondary benchmark is the BSE SENSEX TRI. Currently, the Fund size (AUM) stands at approximately ₹49,218 Crore . investor_snippet: 27486 people have invested ₹ 10.5Cr in SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund in the last three months
about_text: . The fund allocates at least 80% of its assets to equity, preference shares and fully convertible debentures. The remaining is invested in money market instruments to maintain liquidity. The fund enjoys tax benefits under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act. Investors can reduce their tax liability by up to ₹46,800. Investments in the SBI long-term fund are spread across large, small and mid-cap stocks to ensure the portfolio is well diversified. The fund has a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years. Investment Strategy The fund is actively managed by Dinesh Balchandran, who follows a bottom-up stock-picking approach along with fundamental analysis. The investment process involves identifying companies with strong business models and sound management. Each stock in the portfolio is selected after a deep evaluation of its financial health. Who Should Invest In SBI Long Term Equity Fund - Direct Growth? You should invest in the SBI long-term fund if: -You are a first-time investor -You are looking for tax benefits -You want a diversified portfolio Taxation on SBI Long Term Fund Since equity-linked saving schemes have a lock-in period of 3 years, they are not subject to short-term capital gain (STCG). Any gains from selling the SBI long-term fund after 3 years are subject to long-term capital gain or LTCG at the rate of 12.5%. Allocation & Historical Returns Know more about SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund Fund Manager Milind Agrawal Fund Manager of  SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund, since 1 January

about_text: is an equity fund. This fund was started on 1 January, 2013. The fund is managed by Dinesh Balachandran, Anup Upadhyay. The fund could potentially beat inflation in the long-run. Key Parameters SBI Flexicap Fund has ₹23148 Cr worth of assets under management (AUM) as on Feb 2026 and is more than category average. The fund has an expense ratio 0.8. Returns SBI Flexicap Fund has given a CAGR return of 15.16% since inception. Over the last 1, 3 and 5 years the fund has given a CAGR return of 11.32%, 13.96% and 11.90% respectively. Holdings SBI Flexicap Fund has allocated its funds majorly in Cash Equivalent, Financial Services, Consumer Cyclical, Basic Materials, Industrial, Tech, Energy, Communication, Health, Government, Consumer Defensive. Its top holdings are Infosys Ltd, HDFC Bank Ltd, ICICI Bank Ltd, Axis Bank Ltd, Larsen & Toubro Ltd Taxation As it is a flexi cap mutual fund the taxation is as follows:For short term (less than a year) capital gains will be taxed at 20%For long term (more than 1 year) capital gains will be taxed at 12.5% without indexation benefitDividends will always be taxed at slab rate. Long term gains upto Rs 1 lakh are exempt capital gains tax. about_text: is a large-cap mutual fund that invests in the top 100 companies ranked on the stock exchange by their market capitalization. The fund invests at least 80% of its assets in large-cap stocks . The remaining 20% is invested in REITs, debt instruments and money market instruments. SBI Bluechip Direct Growth Fund maintains a strong focus on industries like Finance, Automobile, FMCG, Technology, Energy, etc. The fund managers follow a mix of growth and value style investing to pick stocks for the bluechip fund. This includes picking stocks that are expected to grow faster than others and are undervalued.
